spoilers.text: "Hattori advised Oda not to include Zephyr in the manga".... I don't know who you are, Hattori, or where you live, but....... (😡😡😡) sandman (@sandman_AP) Oda: My editor Hattori got excited every time I drew sexy scenes, so the Amazon Lily arc ended up sexier than I planned. Hattori advised Oda not to include Zephyr in the manga. Oda (2012): I’m reading Kingdom, but Hattori spoiled a major event. What an idiot! 😭 — https://nitter.net/sandman_AP/status/2065758483014959476#m

misc.title: To this day, he remains the most versatile fighter in my eyes (Kaido was too, with his "Drunken Mode," but not quite in the same way as Katakuri). The versatility of his abilities(everything he could
misc.text: To this day, he remains the most versatile fighter in my eyes (Kaido was too, with his "Drunken Mode," but not quite in the same way as Katakuri). The versatility of his abilities(everything he could do with mochi)remains, for me, one of the best aspects of the entire series.
